meanings.definition: the wetness of ground that is covered or soaked with water
examples: the baseball game was canceled because of the wateriness of the outfield
the water's muddiness made it undrinkable
the sloppiness of a rainy November day

meanings.definition: meagerness or poorness connoted by a superfluity of water (in a literary style as well as in a food)
examples: the haziness and wateriness of his disquisitions
no one enjoys the burning of his soup or the wateriness of his potatoes

meanings.definition: the property of resembling the viscosity of water
